Financial Times reports that enterprise buyers now evaluate AI vendors on governance and recoverability as much as on raw model performance.

Sign up to the FT Edit newsletter

Boards increasingly expect deployment teams to explain what happens when retrieval quality drifts, upstream providers change policy, or output monitoring flags a business risk.

Recommended

How finance teams are budgeting for AI oversight

That is pushing operators to document fallback paths, human approvals, and incident playbooks before AI systems scale into core workflows.
